ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the product has */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color the product has */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material the product is made of */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type (e.g., tops, dresses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for sub-categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Extra-Small, Small, Medium) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order of the size (for sorting purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length in inches (for tops) */,
  "pant_length" REAL /* Pant length in inches (for bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the conversion belongs to */,
  "unit_from" TEXT /* Unit the measurement is converted from (e.g., inches) */,
  "unit_to" TEXT /* Unit the measurement is converted to (e.g., centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor (e.g., 1 inch = 2.54 cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_conversions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the size chart belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size chart */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size chart */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size chart */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length for the size chart (for tops) */,
  "pant_length" REAL /* Pant length for the size chart (for bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_products, edit_products) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the customer (for tops) */,
  "pant_length" REAL /* Pant length of the customer (for bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id")
)
